name: Consolidate Atomic Write Helpers

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Consolidate Atomic Write Helpers is complete and correct

scope: Consolidate atomicWriteJSON and AtomicWriteFile in internal/state/io.go. atomicWriteJSON currently duplicates the temp-file-rename pattern; it should marshal to bytes then delegate to AtomicWriteFile instead of reimplementing the pattern itself.
success_criteria: atomicWriteJSON contains no temp-file logic; it marshals JSON then delegates to AtomicWriteFile

breadcrumbs.text: Created 1 child: refactor-and-update-tests (leaf). Two tasks: (1) refactor atomicWriteJSON to delegate to AtomicWriteFile, (2) update test error-message assertions. Single leaf because the scope is small and tightly coupled.
